{{C|Greed||2}} is an {{KW|Unplayable||2}} and {{KW|Eternal||2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curse|2}} Card.

== Obtaining Greed ==
Can only be obtained by taking {{R|Cursed Pearl||2}} from {{KW|Neow||2}}'s offering at the start of the run (for 333 Gold) or from the event {{E|Sunken Treasury|2}} (for 303-363 Gold).
